creator: dirk@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

As far as I can see the only significant changes are 

- adding --with-charset=euc_kr to CONFIGURE_ARGS 
- starting safe_mysqld with --language=korean 

Right? 

If so I think it is better not to copy databases/mysql322 completely 
but add a minimal korean/ko-mysql/Makefile and use databases/mysql322 
as a master port. Thus we can easily add support for other languages. 

What do you think?
